name: Reclaim Tax Credits - Audit Defense for Tax Credits
description: Professional Audit Defense for Tax Credits services in United States. A specialized tax consultancy established in 1993 that helps restaurants, bars, and nightclubs recover FICA Tip Tax Credits. They specialize in §45B credits, offering 3-year retroactive claims and audit defense with no upfront costs.
